financial_answer.brief_explanation: The regulatory assets decreased by $6241 from 2013 to 2014, while deferred tax assets increased by $6348 during the same period. The percentage change is calculated as ((Final - Initial) / Initial) * 100 = (($6348 - (-$6241)) / (-$6241)) * 100 ≈ 11.6%
